summary: Workflow TABLES → BONS → FACTURES (Iteration 95) - Backend 16/16 tests passed. Core workflow working correctly: table creation with items=[], bon_number generation (BON-YYYYMMDD-NNNN), pending→validated transition with bon_number preservation, audit logs. ISSUE FOUND: GET /api/invoices?validated_only=true parameter NOT implemented - returns all invoices regardless of filter.

critical.issue: Parameter 'validated_only' is NOT implemented. The endpoint ignores this parameter and returns ALL invoices (pending + validated) regardless of the filter value. This breaks the strict workflow requirement where validated_only=true should return ONLY validated invoices.

action_items: IMPLEMENT: Add 'validated_only' query parameter to GET /api/invoices endpoint in /app/backend/routers/invoices.py. When validated_only=true, filter query should include {"validation_status": "validated"}. When validated_only=false or not provided, return all invoices.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/invoices (line 257-316 in invoices.py) does not accept 'validated_only' parameter - needs to be added to function signature and query logic

success_rate.backend: 100% (16/16 tests passed - but validated_only filter not working as expected)

seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ITER95_ prefix, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Workflow TABLES → BONS → FACTURES Lot 1 mostly working. Key verified features: 1) POST /api/caisse/tables creates table with items=[] (vierge), 2) POST /api/invoices with table_number generates bon_number (BON-YYYYMMDD-NNNN) and validation_status='pending', 3) PUT /api/caisse/tables/{id} can set status='ready_to_invoice' with pending_invoice_id, 4) PUT /api/invoices/{id} can transition pending→validated preserving bon_number, 5) Audit logs created for 'create' and 'validate' actions. MISSING: GET /api/invoices?validated_only=true parameter not implemented - needs to be added to filter only validated invoices.
